creator: tkato@prontomail.com
text:

Remove file:
files/patch-aa
files/patch-ac
files/patch-lib,gs_init.ps
files/patch-src.gdevxini.c

This PR supersedes ports/28286.

Following PRs related to this port should also be closed by this PR:
ports/27331 (MASTER_SITES of pdf_sec.ps is updated)
ports/24267 (compilation goes fine)
ports/25444 (gimp-print driver is updated)

Note:
Directory name of this port would have to be chenged to 'ghostscript-afpl'.
